creator: liangtai.s16@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 151615
updates qmmp and qmmp-plugin-pack to v0.8.3

Thank you for your request.  That cheers me to make more good and quick reports.

This patch upgrades
multimedia/qmmp: qmmp-0.8.0_6 to qmmp-0.8.3
multimedia/qmmp-plugin-pack: qmmp-plugin-pack-0.8.0_1 to qmmp-plugin-pack-0.8.3

then removes unnecessary @dirrm and @dirrmtry from plist.
